subject: Re: Europe flight
body:
swap with new york time

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 12, 2007 11:44:23 AM
Subject: FW: Europe flight



 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein

 

 




From: George Reenstra 
[mailto:g.reenstra@yourjet.com] 
Sent: Friday, January 12, 2007 11:11 
AM
To: Larsen, Donna
Cc: lvjet@aol.com; Lesley 
Groff
Subject: Europe flight





i spoke with 
Larry  who advised me that Jeffery  may be using the 92 on or about 
the evening of the 19th for a trip from Brussels to Paris.

 

there are a number 
of issues and solutions i need to make everyone aware of and then i will proceed 
as directed

 

the 92 is currently 
in  heavy maintenance and will need 4 days to to return to flight status, 
therefore we must direct Harrods today as to the action to take.  ( this 
time of year is when we normally perform the heavy 
maintenance)

 

Because of weight 
restrictions the 92 can not land in Paris at any location between 11 PM and 7 
AM.  Based on the current flight profile that is a conflict as the trip 
starts at 1 AM.

 

Harrods has a new 
76C++ ( the same as Jeffery is purchasing) which can be made available and 
because of it's weight ( considerable less ) can land in Paris at Le 
Bourget. ( this is what the French are saying , i believe it is correct but 
we are double checking )

 

The cost to charter 
the 76 would be approx 20K USD however i THINK i can get Sikorsky to swap 
the hours against the NYC  time ( 20 hours) they gave Jeffery at the time 
of  purchase.

 

this 76 is the 
quietest in the world so it would be interesting from a sound 
standpoint.   I am assuming not more than 6 passengers.  The 
crewmembers are all well qualified and meet our 
requirements.

 

please advise ASAP 
how you wish me to proceed, best by email after 2 PM est as i will be traveling. 
otherwise my cell is 201 906 1411 
 

 

 

 

 

George Reenstra

Aircraft Services Group, 
Inc.

545 Island Road, Suite 2B

Ramsey, NJ  07446

Phone:  201-995-9570

Fax:      
201-995-9504

E-Mail:  
george@yourjet.com

swap with new york time

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: George Reenstra [mailto:g.reenstra@yourjet.com]
Sent: Friday, January 12, 2007 11:11 AM
To: Larsen, Donna
Cc: lvjet@aol.com; Lesley Groff
Subject: Europe flight

i spoke with Larry  who advised me that Jeffery  may be using the 92 on or about the evening of the 19th for a trip from Brussels to Paris.
 
there are a number of issues and solutions i need to make everyone aware of and then i will proceed as directed
 
the 92 is currently in  heavy maintenance and will need 4 days to to return to flight status, therefore we must direct Harrods today as to the action to take.  ( this time of year is when we normally perform the heavy maintenance)
 
Because of weight restrictions the 92 can not land in Paris at any location between 11 PM and 7 AM.  Based on the current flight profile that is a conflict as the trip starts at 1 AM.
 
Harrods has a new 76C++ ( the same as Jeffery is purchasing) which can be made available and because of it's weight ( considerable less ) can land in Paris at Le Bourget. ( this is what the French are saying , i believe it is correct but we are double checking )
 
The cost to charter the 76 would be approx 20K USD however i THINK i can get Sikorsky to swap the hours against the NYC  time ( 20 hours) they gave Jeffery at the time of  purchase.
 
this 76 is the quietest in the world so it would be interesting from a sound standpoint.   I am assuming not more than 6 passengers.  The crewmembers are all well qualified and meet our requirements.
 
please advise ASAP how you wish me to proceed, best by email after 2 PM est as i will be traveling. otherwise my cell is 201 906 1411
 
 
 
 
 
George Reenstra
Aircraft Services Group, Inc.
545 Island Road, Suite 2B
Ramsey, NJ  07446
Phone:  201-995-9570
Fax:      201-995-9504
E-Mail:  george@yourjet.com
